claims.claim: Israel's standard VAT rate is 18% as of 2026 (raised from 17% on 1 January 2025). The previous rate was 17%.
claims.raw_snippet: מע"מ 2026 הוא 18%

claims.claim: The previous VAT rate before January 2025 was 17%; it increased from 17% to 18%.
claims.raw_snippet: לקראת השינוי בשיעור המע"מ מ-17% ל-18%

claims.claim: The osek patur turnover ceiling is 120,000 ש"ח for 2025, NIS 120,000, and 122,833 ש"ח (NIS 122,833) for 2026, updated annually for inflation.
claims.raw_snippet: נכון לשנת 2026, התקרה עומדת על 122,833 ₪

claims.claim: The osek patur ceiling was NIS 120,000 for 2025 (annual turnover up to 120,000 NIS in 2025).
claims.raw_snippet: עוסק שמחזור עסקאותיו השנתי נמוך מהסף שנקבע בחוק (₪120,000 נכון לשנת 2025)

claims.claim: From 1 January 2026 every tax invoice of NIS 10,000 or more (before VAT) requires an allocation number (mispar haktzaa).
From 1 June 2026 the allocation-number threshold drops to NIS 5,000 or more (before VAT).
claims.raw_snippet: יוני 2026 ואילך | 5,000 ש"ח

claims.claim: Without an allocation number the buyer cannot deduct input VAT on the invoice.
claims.raw_snippet: בלעדיו הלקוח שלכם לא יוכל להזדכות על המע"מ ששילם לכם

claims.claim: A client who withholds tax at source must give the business a withholding certificate and submit an annual summary on Form 856 (טופס 856) by April 30 of the following year. The business needs its own withholding (אישור ניכוי מס במקור) certificate.
claims.raw_snippet: להעביר למס הכנסה ריכוז שנתי בטופס 856 של הסכומים ששולמו...עד ליום 30 באפריל בשנה העוקבת

claims.claim: Certain clients are required to withhold tax from payments to the self-employed business and pay net of the withholding.
claims.raw_snippet: לקוחות מסוימים חייבים לנכות את המס (או חלק ממנו) שבעל העסק צריך להעביר למס הכנסה

claims.claim: The osek zair (micro-dealer) 2026 reform grants an automatic 30% expense deduction off annual turnover, with no need to itemize receipts.
claims.raw_snippet: ההכרה בהוצאות מתבצעת באופן אוטומטי בשיעור של 30% מהמחזור

claims.claim: The osek zair turnover ceiling is CPI-linked, about NIS 122,833 for 2026.
claims.raw_snippet: אם המחזור עובר את התקרה (כ-122,833 ₪ לשנת 2026)

claims.claim: The osek zair reform (approved Nov 2024) lets micro-dealers deduct expenses at 30% without filing a full annual return; turnover up to about 120,000 NIS.
claims.raw_snippet: "עוסקים זעירים" יוכלו לנכות הוצאות בגובה של 30% בלי להגיש דו"ח שנתי

claims.claim: Only 45% of car/vehicle maintenance expenses are recognized for income tax (mixed business/personal use).
claims.raw_snippet: רק 45% מהוצאות הרכב שלך מוכרות לצורכי מס הכנסה

claims.claim: Light refreshments (kibud) at the place of business are only 80% deductible for income tax.
claims.raw_snippet: יותרו בניכוי רק 80% מההוצאות לכיבוד קל

claims.claim: Under Section 17 of the Income Tax Ordinance, an expense wholly used in producing income is a recognized (allowed) expense for income-tax purposes, unless it is specifically determined to be non-deductible. This is the legal basis for fully deducting ordinary business expense categories (office rent, professional services, software, marketing, insurance, travel, etc.).
claims.raw_snippet: סעיף 17 לפקודת מס הכנסה מגדיר הוצאה מוכרת כ'הוצאה ששימשה בייצור הכנסה'

claims.claim: Equipment such as computers, monitors and office furniture is a depreciable asset (פחת), capitalized and written off over its useful life (computers commonly at 33.33% per year over 3 years), NOT expensed 100% in the year of purchase. The input VAT is fully reclaimable in the first period.
claims.raw_snippet: ניתן להשתמש בהן במשך 3 שנים כאשר בכל שנה האחוז המוכר יהיה 33.33% מחלק ההוצאה ללא המע"מ. המע"מ עצמו יהיה מוכר במלואו כבר בשנה הראשונה.

claims.claim: The deductible ceiling for a business gift to a supplier or client is 240 NIS per recipient per year, raised from 210 NIS effective January 2024. Amounts above 240 NIS are not recognized.
claims.raw_snippet: בעבר, תקרת ההוצאה המוכרת עמדה על 210 ש"ח לאדם בשנה. החל מחודש ינואר 2024 ואילך, תקרת ההוצאה המוכרת עלתה לעד 240 ש"ח לאדם בשנה.

claims.claim: A business with annual turnover over NIS 1,520,000 files VAT monthly (חד-חודשי); at or below that figure it files bi-monthly (דו-חודשי). The threshold updates on January 1 each year. This is distinct from the detailed-reporting (דיווח מפורט) obligation, which applies at a different, higher level.
claims.raw_snippet: דיווח חד חודשי - עוסק שמחזור עסקאותיו השנתי הינו מעל 1,520,000 ש"ח.

claims.claim: Israeli bookkeeping rules require keeping books and supporting documents (invoices, receipts, bank records) for at least 7 years from the end of the tax year (or 6 years from the date the annual return was filed, whichever is later); after 7 years from issuance the documents lose legal validity.
claims.raw_snippet: עליכם לשמור מסמכים וקבלות למשך שבע שנים לפחות

claims.claim: Form 126 is an annual report every employer files for each salaried employee (and the income tax withheld); a self-employed business with no employees does not file it. Form 856 is the annual summary of amounts withheld from suppliers and is the form relevant to a typical freelancer.
claims.raw_snippet: טופס 126 הינו טופס דיווח שנתי שכל מעסיק חייב להגיש מדי שנה עבור כל אחד מהעובדים המועסקים אצלו

claims.claim: The Google Workspace CLI repository is the source for the real gws command surface.
claims.raw_snippet: Google Workspace CLI — one command-line tool for Drive, Gmail, Calendar, Sheets, Docs, Chat, Admin, and more.

claims.claim: A Google Sheets spreadsheet ID is the string in the URL between `/d/` and `/edit` (e.g. docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/<ID>/edit).
claims.raw_snippet: The spreadsheet ID is in the URL: https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/spreadsheetId/edit#gid=0 — the value between /d/ and /edit is the spreadsheetId.

claims.claim: The Google Sheets API documentation describes the spreadsheets.values methods and batchUpdate.
claims.raw_snippet: The Google Sheets API is a RESTful interface that lets you read and modify a spreadsheet's data.

claims.claim: Google Apps Script documentation covers the SpreadsheetApp API, custom functions, and triggers.
claims.raw_snippet: Automate & extend Google Workspace with simple code.

claims.claim: The Bank of Israel publishes daily representative exchange rates used for converting foreign-currency transactions.
claims.raw_snippet: שערי חליפין יציגים

claims.claim: The Israel Tax Authority department page is the authoritative source for the current VAT rate, osek patur ceiling, allocation-number thresholds, and reporting schedules.
claims.raw_snippet: רשות המסים בישראל — שיעור מע"מ, תקרת עוסק פטור, מספר הקצאה (חשבוניות ישראל), מועדי דיווח. Note: gov.il returns HTTP 403 to automated fetchers; the underlying figures (VAT 18%, osek patur ceiling 122,833, allocation thresholds 10,000/5,000) are cross-verified against greeninvoice.co.il, kolzchut.org.il, and CPA-firm pages cited in the other claims.
